scenario: Single filer with W-2 wages $68,000, 1099-INT $500 with $75 foreign tax, 1099-DIV $300 QD with $45 foreign tax — FTC $120 de minimis (Schedule 3 Line 1)
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case — Foreign Tax Credit module (Schedule 3 Line 1 de minimis); IRC §901; $120 total FTC ≤ $300 single threshold
